\tzpentry{ID5862}{Theta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5862 introduces Theta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Theta: \Phi_{\mathrm{ac}}(t,\mathbf{r}) \mapsto \overline{\Phi_{\mathrm{ac}}(-t,\mathbf{r})}, \quad \mathbf{A}(t,\mathbf{r}) \mapsto -\overline{\mathbf{A}(-t,\mathbf{r})}. \]
